title: Trump says Iran targets will expand, honors U.S. troops killed in war
summary_full: President Donald Trump honors slain U.S. service members at Dover, threatens to widen U.S. targets after Iran’s president dismissed the notion of surrender.
summary_public: President Donald Trump honors slain U.S. service members at Dover, threatens to widen U.S. targets after Iran’s president dismissed the notion of surrender.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran targets will expand
